name: Barbell Bench Press
setupNotes: Lie flat on a bench, eyes under the bar. Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width.
coachingCues: Drive feet into the floor. Squeeze shoulder blades together. Lower bar to mid-chest. Press up with control.
commonMistakes: Bouncing bar off chest. Flaring elbows too wide. Lifting glutes off the bench.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
setupNotes: Sit on the edge of a bench with dumbbells on your knees. Lie back and bring the weights to chest level.
coachingCues: Keep wrists stacked over elbows. Press weights up in a slight arc. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Clanging dumbbells together at the top. Moving too fast. Short range of motion.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
setupNotes: Set bench to 30-45 degree incline. Lie back with dumbbells at shoulder height.
coachingCues: Press upward toward the ceiling. Keep elbows at a 45-degree angle to your body.
commonMistakes: Bench incline too steep (becomes shoulder press). Arching lower back excessively.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
setupNotes: Bench at 30-45 degrees. Grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
coachingCues: Lower bar to upper chest. Keep elbows tucked at 45 degrees.
commonMistakes: Bouncing bar. Bench too steep.

name: Incline Machine Press
setupNotes: Adjust seat height so handles are at upper chest level.
coachingCues: Press handles forward and up. Control the return.
commonMistakes: Short range of motion.

name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
setupNotes: Lie on bench with dumbbells held above chest, palms facing each other, slight bend in elbows.
coachingCues: Open arms wide in an arc until you feel a stretch. Hug a big tree on the way up.
commonMistakes: Turning it into a press. Extending elbows too much. Going too heavy.

name: Pec Deck Machine
setupNotes: Adjust seat so handles/pads are at chest height.
coachingCues: Squeeze handles together in front of chest. Slow return.
commonMistakes: Using momentum. Seat too high or low.

name: Pushups
setupNotes: Hands slightly wider than shoulders, body in a straight line from head to heels.
coachingCues: Tuck elbows slightly. Engage glutes and core. Touch chest to floor.
commonMistakes: Sagging hips. Poking neck forward. Incomplete range of motion.

name: Incline Pushups
setupNotes: Hands on elevated surface, feet on floor.
coachingCues: Keep body straight. Lower chest to the surface.
commonMistakes: Sagging hips.

name: Knee Pushups
setupNotes: Hands under shoulders, knees on floor.
coachingCues: Body straight from head to knees. Lower chest to floor.
commonMistakes: Hips in the air.

name: Chest Dips
setupNotes: Grip parallel bars, hoist yourself up. Lean slightly forward to target chest.
coachingCues: Lower until shoulders are below elbows. Drive back up to lock out.
commonMistakes: Staying too upright (targets triceps). Swinging legs. Excessive shoulder strain.

name: Machine Dips
setupNotes: Sit in machine, hands on handles at sides.
coachingCues: Press handles down until arms are straight. Control the return.
commonMistakes: Shrugging shoulders.

name: Cable Fly
setupNotes: Set cables to chest height. Stand in middle, take one step forward.
coachingCues: Maintain slight elbow bend. Squeeze chest at the center. Feel the stretch on the way back.
commonMistakes: Leaning too far forward. Using momentum. Short range of motion.

name: Machine Chest Press
setupNotes: Adjust seat so handles are at mid-chest height. Sit back firmly.
coachingCues: Press handles forward without locking elbows. Control the weight back to start.
commonMistakes: Lifting shoulders off the pad. Not using full range of motion.

name: Barbell Deadlift
setupNotes: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot. Grip bar just outside legs.
coachingCues: Flat back. Pull the slack out of the bar. Drive through the floor. Stand tall.
commonMistakes: Rounding the back. Bar drifting away from body. Jerking the weight up.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
setupNotes: Stand inside the bar, feet hip-width. Grip handles at sides.
coachingCues: Keep chest up. Drive through the floor. Stand tall.
commonMistakes: Knees caving in. Rounding back.

name: Pull-ups
setupNotes: Grip bar with palms facing away, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
coachingCues: Drive elbows down. Pull chest toward the bar. Lower with control.
commonMistakes: Kicking legs (kipping). Not going all the way down. Using momentum.

name: Assisted Pull-up
setupNotes: Kneel or stand on the pad. Adjust weight for desired assistance.
coachingCues: Pull chest to handles. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Not using full range.

name: Chin-ups
setupNotes: Grip bar with palms facing you, shoulder-width apart.
coachingCues: Pull chest to bar. Squeeze biceps. Control descent.
commonMistakes: Partial reps.

name: Lat Pulldown
setupNotes: Sit with thighs under pads. Grip bar wider than shoulders.
coachingCues: Pull bar to upper chest. Think about pulling with elbows. Squeeze lats.
commonMistakes: Pulling bar behind neck. Leaning too far back. Using momentum.

name: Seated Cable Row
setupNotes: Sit with feet on platforms, knees slightly bent. Grip handle.
coachingCues: Sit tall. Pull handle to stomach. Squeeze shoulder blades together.
commonMistakes: Excessive leaning back. Rounding shoulders. Shrugging during the pull.

name: Barbell Bent Over Row
setupNotes: Bend at hips and knees, grip bar with overhand grip. Back flat, nearly parallel to floor.
coachingCues: Pull bar to lower ribs. Keep elbows close to body. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Standing too upright. Rounding the back. Bouncing the weight.

name: T-Bar Row
setupNotes: Stand over bar, chest against pad if available. Grip handles.
coachingCues: Pull weight to chest. Squeeze shoulder blades.
commonMistakes: Using legs/momentum. Rounding back.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
setupNotes: One knee and hand on bench for support. Back flat. DB in free hand.
coachingCues: Pull DB to hip. Keep elbow tucked. Squeeze the lat at the top.
commonMistakes: Rotating the torso. Pulling to the shoulder instead of hip.

name: Face Pulls
setupNotes: Set cable to eye height. Grip rope with thumbs facing you.
coachingCues: Pull rope towards forehead. Pull ends apart. Squeeze rear delts.
commonMistakes: Using too much weight. Pulling to chin. Not rotating arms.

name: Band Pull Aparts
setupNotes: Hold band in front of chest, arms straight.
coachingCues: Pull band apart until it touches chest. Squeeze shoulder blades.
commonMistakes: Shrugging shoulders.

name: Hyperextensions
setupNotes: Position hips on pad, ankles under rollers. Cross arms over chest.
coachingCues: Lower torso slowly. Lift until body is in a straight line. Squeeze glutes.
commonMistakes: Overextending (arching) at the top. Moving too fast.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
setupNotes: Feet shoulder-width apart. Bar resting on upper chest. Grip just outside shoulders.
coachingCues: Squeeze glutes and core. Press bar straight up. Move head out of the way.
commonMistakes: Leaning back too far. Not locking out. Flaring elbows.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
setupNotes: Sit or stand with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
coachingCues: Press DBs up until arms are straight. Control down.
commonMistakes: Arching back. Clanging weights.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
setupNotes: Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder height.
coachingCues: Press handles up. Slow descent.
commonMistakes: Seat too low.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
setupNotes: Stand tall with dumbbells at sides, slight bend in elbows.
coachingCues: Lead with the elbows. Lift to shoulder height. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Swinging the weights. Lifting above shoulder height. Shrugging.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
setupNotes: Set cable to low position. Stand sideways to machine.
coachingCues: Lift arm to shoulder height. Keep slight elbow bend.
commonMistakes: Using momentum.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
setupNotes: Stand with dumbbells in front of thighs.
coachingCues: Lift weights straight in front to shoulder height. Keep core tight.
commonMistakes: Using momentum. Arching the back.

name: Plate Front Raise
setupNotes: Hold plate at sides (3 and 9 o'clock).
coachingCues: Lift plate to eye level. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Using momentum.

name: Cable Front Raise
setupNotes: Low pulley, handle in front of you.
coachingCues: Lift arm forward to shoulder height. Slow return.
commonMistakes: Leaning back.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
setupNotes: Hinge at hips, back flat. DBs hanging down, palms facing each other.
coachingCues: Lift weights out to the sides. Squeeze shoulder blades. Control the weight.
commonMistakes: Using too much weight. Standing up during the set.

name: Machine Reverse Fly
setupNotes: Sit facing the machine. Adjust seat height.
coachingCues: Open arms wide. Squeeze rear delts.
commonMistakes: Short range of motion.

name: Arnold Press
setupNotes: Sit on bench. Hold DBs in front of chest, palms facing you.
coachingCues: Rotate palms out as you press up. Finish with palms facing forward.
commonMistakes: Rushing the rotation. Not completing the full range.

name: Dumbbell Shrugs
setupNotes: Stand with dumbbells at sides.
coachingCues: Elevate shoulders toward ears. Squeeze at the top. Don't roll shoulders.
commonMistakes: Rolling shoulders. Using momentum from legs.

name: Barbell Shrugs
setupNotes: Grip bar in front of thighs.
coachingCues: Lift shoulders straight up. Squeeze traps.
commonMistakes: Rolling shoulders.

name: Upright Row
setupNotes: Hold bar in front of thighs with narrow grip.
coachingCues: Pull bar toward chin, leading with elbows. Keep bar close to body.
commonMistakes: Pulling too high. Jerking the weight.

name: Military Press
setupNotes: Strict overhead press with feet close together.
coachingCues: Keep body rigid. No leg drive. Press to full lockout.
commonMistakes: Using legs. Excessive back arch.

name: Barbell Curl
setupNotes: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Grip bar with underhand grip.
coachingCues: Keep elbows pinned to sides. Curl bar to shoulders. Control descent.
commonMistakes: Swinging hips. Moving elbows forward. Partial reps.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
setupNotes: Hold EZ-bar with underhand grip on the angled sections.
coachingCues: Curl bar to chest. Keep elbows steady.
commonMistakes: Swinging.

name: Dumbbell Curl
setupNotes: Stand or sit with dumbbells at sides.
coachingCues: Rotate palms up as you curl. Squeeze bicep at the top.
commonMistakes: Swinging. Not rotating wrists.

name: Hammer Curl
setupNotes: Stand with dumbbells at sides, palms facing your body.
coachingCues: Keep palms facing in throughout the movement. Curl to shoulders.
commonMistakes: Swinging the weights. Moving elbows.

name: Rope Hammer Curl
setupNotes: Low pulley, rope attachment. Palms facing in.
coachingCues: Curl rope ends toward shoulders. Squeeze. Slow down.
commonMistakes: Moving elbows forward.

name: Preacher Curl
setupNotes: Sit at bench, armpits snug against the pad. Arms extended.
coachingCues: Curl weight up while keeping arms flat on pad. Don't lift elbows.
commonMistakes: Not fully extending arms. Using momentum.

name: Concentration Curl
setupNotes: Sit on bench, legs apart. Rest elbow against inner thigh.
coachingCues: Curl dumbbell toward chest. Focus on the bicep contraction.
commonMistakes: Using the leg to push the weight up.

name: Cable Curl
setupNotes: Attach bar to low pulley. Stand facing machine.
coachingCues: Constant tension. Squeeze at the top. Slow eccentric.
commonMistakes: Leaning back. Moving elbows.

name: Tricep Pushdown
setupNotes: Stand facing cable machine. Grip attachment at chest height.
coachingCues: Pin elbows to ribs. Push bar down until arms are straight. Squeeze triceps.
commonMistakes: Letting elbows drift. Leaning into the weight.

name: Skullcrushers
setupNotes: Lie on bench. Hold bar over chest. Lower bar toward forehead by bending elbows.
coachingCues: Keep upper arms stationary. Extend elbows to start position.
commonMistakes: Moving the upper arms. Dropping the weight too fast.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
setupNotes: Hold weight overhead with both hands.
coachingCues: Lower weight behind head by bending elbows. Extend back to top.
commonMistakes: Flaring elbows out. Arching lower back.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
setupNotes: Lie on bench. Grip bar with hands shoulder-width apart.
coachingCues: Keep elbows close to body. Lower bar to mid-chest. Press up.
commonMistakes: Grip too narrow (hurts wrists). Flaring elbows.

name: Dumbbell Tricep Kickbacks
setupNotes: Hinge at hips, back flat. Upper arm parallel to floor, elbow bent.
coachingCues: Straighten arm back. Squeeze tricep. Don't swing.
commonMistakes: Using momentum. Dropping the elbow.

name: Bench Dips
setupNotes: Hands on edge of bench, feet in front. Lower hips by bending elbows.
coachingCues: Keep back close to bench. Press back up.
commonMistakes: Shoulders rolling forward. Moving too fast.

name: Barbell Squat
setupNotes: Bar on upper traps. Feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly out.
coachingCues: Hips back and down. Keep chest up. Drive through mid-foot. Knees out.
commonMistakes: Knees caving in. Rounding back. Not going deep enough.

name: Leg Press
setupNotes: Sit in machine. Feet shoulder-width apart on platform.
coachingCues: Lower platform until knees are at 90 degrees. Don't lock knees at top.
commonMistakes: Locking knees. Lifting lower back off seat.

name: Leg Extension
setupNotes: Adjust seat so back is against pad. Shins against rollers.
coachingCues: Extend legs fully. Squeeze quads at top. Control weight down.
commonMistakes: Using momentum. Moving hips off seat.

name: Goblet Squat
setupNotes: Hold weight at chest height with both hands.
coachingCues: Squat down between your legs. Keep chest up. Elbows inside knees.
commonMistakes: Leaning too far forward. Lifting heels.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
setupNotes: One foot back on bench, other foot forward. Hold DBs at sides.
coachingCues: Lower back knee toward floor. Keep front shin vertical. Stay upright.
commonMistakes: Front foot too close. Leaning too far forward.

name: Front Squat
setupNotes: Bar on front of shoulders (rack position). Elbows high.
coachingCues: Keep elbows up. Stay upright. Squat deep.
commonMistakes: Elbows dropping. Rounding upper back.

name: Hack Squat
setupNotes: Position back against pad, shoulders under rollers.
coachingCues: Lower until thighs are parallel to platform. Press up.
commonMistakes: Heels lifting. Partial reps.

name: Dumbbell Lunges
setupNotes: Stand with dumbbells at sides.
coachingCues: Step forward, lower back knee. Keep torso upright. Push back to start.
commonMistakes: Short steps. Knee traveling too far forward.

name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
setupNotes: Stand with weight, feet hip-width. Slight knee bend.
coachingCues: Push hips back. Lower weight until you feel a stretch. Keep back flat.
commonMistakes: Rounding the back. Turning it into a squat.

name: Lying Leg Curl
setupNotes: Lie face down. Rollers against heels.
coachingCues: Curl legs up toward glutes. Squeeze. Control on the way down.
commonMistakes: Lifting hips off pad. Using momentum.

name: Seated Leg Curl
setupNotes: Sit in machine, back against pad. Rollers against ankles.
coachingCues: Curl legs down. Squeeze. Slow return.
commonMistakes: Lifting off seat.

name: Glute Ham Raise (GHR)
setupNotes: Ankles under rollers, knees on pad.
coachingCues: Lower body until parallel to floor. Pull yourself up using hamstrings.
commonMistakes: Breaking at the hips. Using momentum.

name: Stiff Leg Deadlift
setupNotes: Legs straight but not locked. Hinge forward.
coachingCues: Focus on hamstring stretch. Keep bar close to body.
commonMistakes: Rounding back. Locking knees too hard.

name: Barbell Good Mornings
setupNotes: Bar on upper traps (squat position). Feet hip-width.
coachingCues: Hinge at hips. Push hips back until torso is nearly parallel to floor.
commonMistakes: Bending knees too much. Rounding back.

name: Kettlebell Swing
setupNotes: KB on floor in front of you. Hinge to grab handle.
coachingCues: Snap hips forward to swing KB. Use your legs, not your arms.
commonMistakes: Squatting instead of hinging. Using arms to lift.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
setupNotes: Shoulders on bench. Bar across hips. Feet flat on floor.
coachingCues: Drive through heels. Extend hips fully. Squeeze glutes at top.
commonMistakes: Not full range. Arching back instead of moving hips.

name: Glute Bridge
setupNotes: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
coachingCues: Lift hips toward ceiling. Squeeze glutes at top.
commonMistakes: Pushing from toes. Arching back.

name: Glute Cable Kickback
setupNotes: Attach ankle strap to low pulley. Face machine.
coachingCues: Kick leg back. Focus on the glute contraction. Don't arch back.
commonMistakes: Using too much weight. Leaning too far forward.

name: Seated Hip Abduction
setupNotes: Sit in machine. Outer thighs against pads.
coachingCues: Push legs apart. Pause at peak. Control back to start.
commonMistakes: Moving too fast. Not using full range.

name: Dumbbell Step Ups
setupNotes: One foot on box. Hold DBs at sides.
coachingCues: Drive through the top foot. Stand tall on box. Control descent.
commonMistakes: Pushing off with bottom foot. Box too high.

name: Sumo Deadlift
setupNotes: Wide stance. Grip bar inside legs. Toes pointed out.
coachingCues: Pry floor apart with feet. Hips close to bar. Drive up.
commonMistakes: Hips too high. Back rounding.

name: Standing Calf Raise
setupNotes: Stand on edge of platform. Shoulders under pads.
coachingCues: Full stretch at bottom. Drive onto big toe. Squeeze at top.
commonMistakes: Bouncing. Short range of motion.

name: Seated Calf Raise
setupNotes: Sit with thighs under pads. Feet on platform.
coachingCues: Drop heels for stretch. Raise as high as possible. Control descent.
commonMistakes: Bouncing. Not pausing at top/bottom.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
setupNotes: Use leg press machine, balls of feet on edge of platform.
coachingCues: Push platform away using only ankles.
commonMistakes: Bouncing.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
setupNotes: Bend over, back parallel to floor. Hips under pads.
coachingCues: Excellent stretch position. Keep knees slightly bent.
commonMistakes: Rushing reps.

name: Tibialis Raise
setupNotes: Back against wall. Feet away from wall.
coachingCues: Lift toes toward shins. Pause. Lower slowly.
commonMistakes: Knees bending.

name: Banded Tibialis Raise
setupNotes: Sit with legs straight, band around toes and anchored.
coachingCues: Pull toes toward you against band resistance.
commonMistakes: Moving legs.

name: Plank
setupNotes: Forearms and toes on floor. Body in straight line.
coachingCues: Squeeze glutes and abs. Don't let hips sag. Breathe.
commonMistakes: Hips too high or too low. Holding breath.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
setupNotes: Kneel on floor, hold ab wheel handles.
coachingCues: Roll forward while keeping back slightly rounded. Pull back using abs.
commonMistakes: Arching back. Using arms to pull back.

name: Crunches
setupNotes: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
coachingCues: Lift shoulders off floor using abs. Look at ceiling.
commonMistakes: Pulling on neck. Using momentum.

name: Sit-ups
setupNotes: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat. Lift torso to knees.
coachingCues: Curling motion. Control the descent.
commonMistakes: Pulling on neck.

name: Lying Leg Raises
setupNotes: Lie on back, hands under glutes for support.
coachingCues: Lift legs to 90 degrees. Lower slowly. Keep lower back on floor.
commonMistakes: Arching lower back. Moving too fast.

name: Russian Twists
setupNotes: Sit with knees bent, feet off floor. Lean back slightly.
coachingCues: Rotate torso from side to side. Touch floor on each side.
commonMistakes: Only moving arms, not torso.

name: Cable Woodchoppers
setupNotes: Set cable to high pulley. Stand sideways.
coachingCues: Pull handle diagonally across body. Rotate through torso.
commonMistakes: Using arms only. Moving hips too much.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
setupNotes: Hang from bar with overhand grip.
coachingCues: Lift knees to chest. Squeeze abs. Control descent.
commonMistakes: Swinging. Using momentum.

name: Deadbug
setupNotes: Lie on back. Arms up, knees at 90 degrees.
coachingCues: Lower opposite arm and leg. Keep lower back pinned to floor.
commonMistakes: Losing lower back contact. Moving too fast.

name: Bird Dog
setupNotes: On all fours. Hands under shoulders, knees under hips.
coachingCues: Extend opposite arm and leg. Maintain flat back. Don't rotate hips.
commonMistakes: Arching back. Lifting leg too high.

name: Treadmill Run
setupNotes: Start at slow walking pace.
coachingCues: Maintain upright posture. Land mid-foot. Consistent breathing.
commonMistakes: Holding onto side rails. Slouching.

name: Stationary Cycling
setupNotes: Adjust seat height so leg is slightly bent at bottom of stroke.
coachingCues: Keep steady cadence. Engage core.
commonMistakes: Seat too low. Slumping over handlebars.

name: Rowing Machine
setupNotes: Secure feet in straps. Grip handle.
coachingCues: Drive with legs first. Then lean back. Then pull with arms.
commonMistakes: Pulling with arms first. Rounding back.

name: Elliptical Trainer
setupNotes: Step onto pedals, grab handles.
coachingCues: Smooth circular motion. Use handles for upper body engagement.
commonMistakes: Using only legs. Going too fast without resistance.

name: Stair Climber
setupNotes: Start at slow speed. Don't lean on rails.
coachingCues: Take full steps. Stay upright.
commonMistakes: Leaning heavily on handles. Half-steps.

name: Treadmill Incline Walk
setupNotes: Set treadmill to 5-15% incline. Walk at 3-4 mph.
coachingCues: Don't hold onto rails. Lean slightly forward.
commonMistakes: Holding onto rails (reduces effort).

name: Jump Rope
setupNotes: Adjust rope length to your height.
coachingCues: Small jumps on balls of feet. Flick wrists. Relax shoulders.
commonMistakes: Jumping too high. Using arms instead of wrists.

name: Jumping Jacks
setupNotes: Stand with feet together, arms at sides.
coachingCues: Jump feet out and bring hands overhead. Jump back to start.
commonMistakes: Landing hard.

name: Battle Ropes
setupNotes: Athletic stance. Grip rope ends.
coachingCues: Create waves. Use arms and core. Stay low.
commonMistakes: Standing too tall. Not using core.

name: Burpees
setupNotes: Start in standing position.
coachingCues: Drop to plank. Do a pushup. Jump feet in. Jump up.
commonMistakes: Sagging hips in plank. Landing on toes.
